# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

# Use official node image from docker hub
FROM node:14 as builder

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./

RUN npm install

COPY . .

CMD [ "node", "server.js" ]

# Production Environment 
FROM builder as prod-env

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl git vim netcat jq nano telnet 

# Development Environment  
FROM builder as dev-env

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl git vim netcat jq nano telnet build-essential python
